case_title: ZHI YONG CHEN VS. GOLDEN 88 CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-25-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZHI YONG CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN 88 CONSTRUCTION INC. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PARTIES STATED THEY HAD A FULL AGREEMENT AND THE DEFENDANT WAS ON HIS WAY TO CUT A CHECK FOR THE CLAIM TO THE PLAINTIFF TODAY. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ZHI YONG CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN 88 CONSTRUCTION INC. IS NOT PRESENT. MATTER WAS SET FOR A PROGRESS REPORT AFTER SETTLEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING. JUDGE: BRIAN STRETCH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, ZHI YONG AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN 88 CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED JAN-11-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN 88 CONSTRUCTION INC.
